rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Elec. Code §251.002, which governs which officeholders are covered by election title provisions.
quote: Sec. 251.002. OFFICEHOLDERS COVERED. (a) The provisions of this title applicable to an officeholder apply only to a person who holds an elective public office and to the secretary of state.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election code officeholder coverage, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
